summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restaurant management app. Backend APIs working 100%, frontend mostly functional with one Select component bug in Stock Planner.

ui_bugs.issue: React error: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

passed_tests: Products API - all 10 products loaded correctly
Markets API - all 5 markets loaded correctly
Sessions API - all 11 sessions loaded correctly
Dashboard KPIs - exact match: Total Sales $12,008, Gross Profit $9,075.04, Avg COGS 24.43%, 11 Sessions
Sales by month, Product performance, Margin watch APIs
Allocation settings and calculation APIs (after fix)
Dashboard page loads with correct KPIs and charts
Session Input page - market dropdown, all 10 product fields, cash/EFTPOS inputs
Products/COGS page - all 10 products with pricing, COGS calculations, stock alerts
Sales Dashboard page - KPIs, monthly charts, trends
Navigation sidebar - all menu items clickable and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component bug in Stock Planner page - ensure all Select.Item components have non-empty value props. The error occurs in the market/product selection dropdown.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 major features working, 1 Select component bug)
